chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 241 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 30-05-2025 Syed Asghar Ali Shah, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G. ******* By filing Vakalatnama as well as comments on behalf of respondents No.4 to 6, Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate undertakes that monthly pension of the petitioner will be released within 15-days. However, insofar as post-retirement benefits of the petitioners are concerned, he submits that the Vice Chancellor, Shah Abdul Latif University, Khairpur (respondent No.4) shall decide the case of the petitioner within a period of one month. After such statement, counsel for petitioner while expressing satisfaction seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly instant petition is disposed of with directions to the respondent No.4 to comply with above order in letter and spirit. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
